text.tspan: Step Complexity | Work Complexity | Wall-Clock Time

div.p: Throughput vs Latency: The GPU does not reduce total operations (Work). It reduces execution time (Steps) by mapping independent tasks to thousands of hardware cores.
Efficiency: Blelloch Scan and Tree Reduction achieve O(n) work efficiency while maintaining O(log n) span.
Note: GPU times include PCIe transfer overhead for N=16M.
